active_projects.description: Conference talk walking through the zed/examples/epi-study synthetic RCT demo (KAT vs TAU, adjusted OR 3.29) as an end-to-end showcase of the /epi Claude Code workflow for a mixed clinical/informatics audience

source_materials: /home/benjamin/.config/zed/examples/epi-study/ (systematic review of entire directory: README.md, EPI_ANSWERS.md, scripts/, data/, reports/consort_report.md, reports/tables/*, logs/)
forcing_data.audience_context: Mixed clinical/informatics audience. Topic: demonstrating the Claude Code /epi extension via a synthetic RCT (ketamine-assisted therapy vs treatment-as-usual for methamphetamine use disorder, N=200, primary adjusted OR=3.29 for 12-week abstinence). Conference format, 15-20 min. Balance tooling narrative, methods/CONSORT rigor, and the headline clinical finding. Emphasize reproducibility (deterministic seeds, base-R fallbacks) and the four-step /epi -> /research -> /plan -> /implement workflow.
